summary: Iteration 32 - Market Maker Treasury Tests. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with MM pricing strip, bid/ask/spread/treasury/model display, and crypto off-ramp with USDT/USDC selector.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Maker Treasury integration complete. Treasury = Massimo's account. All MM endpoints working: /api/market-maker/pricing (PUBLIC), /api/market-maker/treasury (AUTH), /api/market-maker/pnl (AUTH), /api/market-maker/risk (AUTH). NENO Exchange endpoints updated with MM: /api/neno-exchange/price, /api/neno-exchange/quote, /api/neno-exchange/market, /api/neno-exchange/buy, /api/neno-exchange/sell. Crypto off-ramp correctly fails with 'insufficiente' message when USDT/USDC balance is 0. Frontend shows MM pricing strip with BID, ASK, SPREAD, SKEW, TREASURY, MODEL=Market Maker.

backend_tests_summary.test_01_mm_pricing_public: PASSED - Returns bid, ask, mid_price, spread_bps, treasury_neno=397, treasury_owner=massimo email, inventory_ratio, inventory_skew
backend_tests_summary.test_02_mm_treasury_full: PASSED - Returns owner=massimo email, assets with internal_balance+onchain_balance, NENO ~397 onchain, EUR ~29640 internal
backend_tests_summary.test_03_mm_treasury_neno_asset: PASSED - Returns NENO with amount=397, onchain_balance=397, internal_balance=0
backend_tests_summary.test_04_mm_treasury_eur_asset: PASSED - Returns EUR with amount=~29640, internal_balance=~29640
backend_tests_summary.test_05_mm_pnl_report: PASSED - Returns treasury_owner=massimo email, trade data
backend_tests_summary.test_06_mm_risk_dashboard: PASSED - Returns treasury_owner=massimo email, risk_level, inventory metrics
backend_tests_summary.test_08_neno_exchange_quote_buy: PASSED - Uses ask price, shows mm_bid, mm_ask, mm_spread_bps, mm_mid_price
backend_tests_summary.test_11_buy_neno_updates_treasury_eur: PASSED - Buy trade INCREASES Massimo's EUR balance (Treasury receives EUR)
backend_tests_summary.test_12_sell_neno_updates_treasury_eur: PASSED - Sell trade DECREASES Massimo's EUR balance (Treasury pays EUR)
backend_tests_summary.test_14_crypto_offramp_usdc_also_fails: PASSED - Returns 500 with insufficient balance message
backend_tests_summary.test_15_treasury_usdt_balance: PASSED - Shows 0 USDT balance (explains crypto off-ramp failure)

frontend_tests_summary.mm_pricing_strip: VERIFIED - Shows BID 9,815.16, ASK 9,984.82, SPREAD 169.7 bps, SKEW -1.65%, TREASURY 397.0, MODEL Market Maker
frontend_tests_summary.tabs: VERIFIED - All tabs present: Compra, Vendi, Swap, Deposita, Off-Ramp, Crea Token
frontend_tests_summary.buy_quote: VERIFIED - Shows Prezzo NENO (Ask) EUR 9,984.82, Mid Price EUR 9,999.99, Spread 169.7 bps
frontend_tests_summary.offramp_crypto: VERIFIED - Crypto destination button, wallet input, USDT/USDC selector buttons, info message present
